narration: You're doing everything right — maxing out your 401k as fast as possible. But here's a trap even diligent savers walk right into.
visual: Dark background. Person silhouette at a laptop. A green progress bar fills up rapidly labeled '401k MAX $23,500'. A red warning badge springs in: 'BUT THERE'S A TRAP'. Paycheck icons line the bottom.

narration: Most employers match per paycheck — say three percent of whatever you contribute that pay period. Stop contributing and they stop matching. Simple as that.
visual: Light background. Calendar grid showing 26 pay periods. Each paycheck icon has a green match arrow beneath it. Animation shows arrows disappearing once contributions stop in October.

narration: Here's the thing: forty-three percent of 401k plans don't have a true-up. That means your employer owes you zero catch-up for missed matches.
visual: Dark background. Two large pie slices: green 57% labeled 'TRUE-UP EXISTS — you're safe' and red 43% labeled 'NO TRUE-UP — you're losing money'. Red slice pulses.

narration: You max out by October — that leaves twelve pay periods with zero contributions. At three hundred fifty-eight dollars of match per check, you just handed back four thousand three hundred dollars.
visual: Light background. Month calendar: Jan through Oct in green with check marks, Nov and Dec in red with X marks. Dollar coins fly away from the calendar. Bold counter ticks up to '$4,300 LOST'.

narration: The fix is stupidly simple. Just divide twenty-three thousand five hundred by your number of pay periods. Spread it evenly — same max, zero missed match.
visual: Dark background. '$23,500 ÷ 26 = $904/paycheck' equation animates in. Below, an evenly-spaced bar chart shows 26 equal green bars, all with match arrows beneath them. Label: 'FULL MATCH. EVERY PAYCHECK.'

narration: Pull up your 401k plan document tonight and search for 'true-up.' If it's not there, call HR first thing tomorrow. This one question could put four grand back in your pocket.
visual: Light background. Document SVG springs in with a search highlight on the words 'TRUE-UP'. Phone SVG beside it. Green checkmark animates in. Bottom CTA: 'ONE CALL = $4,300 BACK IN YOUR POCKET'.
